description: azurecontainerapps.io is the default domain used for apps hosted on Microsoft Azure Container Apps. The discovered hosts here are application-specific endpoints, including MCP servers for event discovery and spiritual-teachings exploration.
summary: azurecontainerapps.io currently exposes two known MCP server surfaces from registry data: Inviton and Soul Family AI; Soul Family AI is publicly accessible, while Inviton appears protected but its exact auth mechanics could not be confirmed from public docs.
